content: TASK-062 completed the golden-grid Topology view. The UI/API name is Topology/topology; the complete SVG canvas, cells, gaps, and padding preserve the golden ratio; large components merge integer cells; zones, boundaries, and subgraphs derive cell-aligned containment geometry; subgraphs are fixed to transparent dashed guides; and Topology routing passes component and endpoint-incidence validation. Browser evidence: 1340x828 viewBox (1.61836), zero node overlaps, and no curated-sample diagnostics. Next: decide whether Topology should enter a v0.3.0 feature release after broader real-world fixture evaluation.
